slides.title: Train them *more*
slides.body: Arms handle frequency. Hit them often.

slides.title: Hit *triceps* harder
slides.body: Two thirds of your arm is triceps.

slides.title: Stretch and *squeeze*
slides.body: Full range beats heavy half reps.

slides.title: Arms need a *surplus*
slides.body: You can't grow on a deficit.

slides.title: Build the *arms*.
slides.body: Vibe Health keeps your training and protein on track.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store
